name: UwsIdsPpbmGrpXrefExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_source AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, PBM_GRP_ID, EFF_DT, TERM_DT, GRP_ID, CRT_USER_ID, CRT_DTM, LAST_UPDT_USER_ID, LAST_UPDT_DTM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.PBM_GRP_XREF), cte_transform AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD AS SRC_SYS_CD, PBM_GRP_ID AS PBM_GRP_ID, CAST(EFF_DT AS DATETIME) AS EFF_DT, CAST(TERM_DT AS DATETIME) AS TERM_DT, GRP_ID AS GRP_ID, CRT_USER_ID AS CRT_USER_ID, CAST(CRT_DTM AS DATETIME) AS CRT_DTM, LAST_UPDT_USER_ID AS LAST_UPDT_USER_ID, CAST(LAST_UPDT_DTM AS DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDT_DTM FROM cte_source) SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, PBM_GRP_ID, EFF_DT, TERM_DT, GRP_ID, CRT_USER_ID, CRT_DTM, LAST_UPDT_USER_ID, LAST_UPDT_DTM FROM cte_transform
